report_title: Weekly Lead Summary — Bright Spark Electrical — 26 May to 1 June 2026
period_summary: Four leads received this week: one confirmed win, one replied and awaiting response, one draft awaiting operator approval, and one spam filtered automatically.
recommended_actions: Review and send the draft reply waiting for approval (full rewire enquiry).
Follow up on the EICR enquiry if no response is received by mid-week.
client_facing_summary: A solid week for new enquiries. One EV charger job confirmed, one EICR enquiry is progressing well, and a full rewire quote request is being prepared. One piece of spam was automatically filtered and required no action.
operator_notes: Leads a1b2c3d4 (EICR) and d4e5f6a7 (rewire) are both open. d4e5f6a7 has a draft awaiting your approval — review before the end of the day. No escalations this week.
